prioritized_fixes.issue: ZERO statistically significant results after multiple comparison correction
prioritized_fixes.action: Revise paper framing to honestly report zero significant results after MCP. Every p-value citation must include: 'p=X uncorrected; Bonferroni-corrected p=Y; BH-FDR q=Z.' Consider reframing as null-result study with H5 (precision-recall asymmetry) as empirical anchor.

prioritized_fixes.issue: Title-abstract promise graph as predictive tool but graph predicts nothing
prioritized_fixes.action: Retitle paper to emphasize LCA-theoretical framework, not graph predictions. Suggested title: 'Feature Absorption as Competitive Suppression: An LCA-Theoretic Framework.' Remove 'First local inhibition graph for SAE diagnostics' from contributions. Revise abstract to lead with structural correspondence (G=W_dec^T W_dec), state H6 falsification clearly.

prioritized_fixes.issue: H1b p=0.028 presented as significant without MCP context
prioritized_fixes.action: Add MCP context to every p-value citation throughout paper. Example: '$r = -0.431$, p=0.028 uncorrected; Bonferroni-corrected p=0.334; BH-FDR q=0.107.' Do not present uncorrected p=0.028 as evidence of statistical significance.

prioritized_fixes.issue: H6 falsification (precision@20=0.0) claimed as contribution despite graph predicting nothing
prioritized_fixes.action: Remove 'First local inhibition graph for SAE diagnostics' from contributions. Report H6 as definitively falsified, not as 'valuable negative result.' Section 6.3 claims graph 'identifies latents with high total incoming inhibition' despite H8 finding r=+0.12, p=0.55 — remove this contradiction.

prioritized_fixes.issue: H9 co-occurrence measurement is definitional tautology
prioritized_fixes.action: Remove H9 from paper entirely. Remove from all tables, hypothesis summaries, and integration discussions (Section 4.8 Table 5). It is a mathematical identity, not an empirical finding.

prioritized_fixes.issue: Post-hoc power analysis (20% power) is methodologically questionable
prioritized_fixes.action: Remove post-hoc power analysis entirely. Acknowledge insufficient power as a design limitation in methodology: 'n=26 features provides insufficient power to detect medium effects; null results should be interpreted as inconclusive, not as evidence of no effect.'

prioritized_fixes.issue: OrtSAE ablation comparison at unmatched L0 (920 vs 550)
prioritized_fixes.action: Match L0 values for valid comparison, or explicitly acknowledge this confound invalidates the ablation conclusion. Do not claim the orthogonality penalty comparison is informative if L0 is unmatched.

prioritized_fixes.issue: Probe quality confound in CMI-absorption analysis (rho=-0.67 with probe F1)
prioritized_fixes.action: Compute partial correlation controlling for probe F1, or restrict CMI analysis to quality-gated letters (F1>0.85). Acknowledge this confound in limitations.

prioritized_fixes.issue: CMI-absorption correlation dimensionally unstable (sign reversal d'=10 to d'>=20)
prioritized_fixes.action: Report results across all dimensions. Do not cherry-pick d'=10 as primary. Acknowledge dimension instability as a qualitative failure, not a sensitivity issue.

prioritized_fixes.issue: MCC~0.21 across all variants including Random control suggests chance-level matching
prioritized_fixes.action: Investigate whether Hungarian matching is valid before claiming any comparisons. If MCC is at chance level for Random SAEs, the entire matching pipeline is suspect and all matching-based conclusions are unreliable.

prioritized_fixes.issue: Feature U (n=1) overgeneralized to conclude 'absorption is benign'
prioritized_fixes.action: Remove generalization. Report Feature U's result as a single case observation only. Other high-absorption features (H: 19.0% at 0.55 steering, S: 16.0% at 0.65) show the generalization does not hold.

prioritized_fixes.issue: H8 claim (r=+0.12, p=0.55) lacks verifiable data source in h6_inhibition_graph.json
prioritized_fixes.action: Provide reproducible computation or remove specific numbers. Document how total incoming inhibition was computed per feature.

prioritized_fixes.issue: Figure filename mismatch (fig7_precision_recall.pdf called Figure 3 in text)
prioritized_fixes.action: Use consistent figure numbering that matches filenames, or include figure file paths in text references.

prioritized_fixes.issue: H10 (homeostatic rebalancing) not executed but discussed as practical contribution
prioritized_fixes.action: Either execute H10 or remove all discussion of homeostatic rebalancing as a practical contribution. Section 5.3 discusses it as implementable but it has never been validated.

major_revisions_needed: Retitle paper to emphasize LCA-theoretical framework, not graph predictions
Revise abstract to honestly report H6 falsification and zero MCP-significant results
Add MCP context to all p-value citations
Remove graph as diagnostic contribution (it predicts nothing per H6 and H8)
Remove H9 (tautology) from all tables and discussions
Control for probe quality in CMI-absorption analysis
Match L0 in OrtSAE ablation or acknowledge confound
Investigate MCC pipeline validity before claiming matching-based comparisons
structural_changes: Consider pivoting to metric validation study if graph-based predictions are abandoned entirely (Alternative A in alternatives.md)
If keeping LCA framework, restructure paper around theoretical contribution with H5 as empirical anchor (precision-recall asymmetry is the one robust replicable finding)
Add explicit power analysis section before claiming null results (pre-registered, not post-hoc)
Move H6 falsification to a dedicated negative results section rather than integrating into positive narrative
